name: Basic Pizza Dough 10/11/96
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the yeast and sugar with 1/2 cup of water and 1/4 cup of flour until combined.
2. Allow the mixture to proof for 10 minutes; it should become frothy.
3. Add the remaining flour, salt, and olive oil to the bowl. Mix well.
4. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead for 8-10 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
5. Alternatively, place the mixture in the dough hook of a heavy-duty mixer and knead on low speed for the same time.
6. The dough should feel moist and tender. If it is too stiff, add a bit more water.
7. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, turning to coat evenly.
8. Cover the bowl and let rise in a warm place (at least 75°F) for 1-2 hours.
Yield: 1 large rectangular pizza
